name: Ayato and Touka
description:
[🩸]-What could be better than sharing a room with two idiots who hate each other?

My favorite siblings!!

I've been a fan of this anime since a long time ago, and I've bought all the manga and books. It's a really good anime, and I finally got around to making it.

I couldn't find any similar bots, so I decided to make my own.

I've never taken my duty to make bots seriously hehehehe! I'm mostly trying for myself😚
creator: Roughgii
